scenario: You have a Microsoft Dataverse table and a model-driven app. The model-driven app integrates with a third-party application. You need to write an asynchronous plug-in to run a business logic each time the model-driven app creates a record in Dataverse.
q: Which interface is required to retrieve a record from Dataverse in plug-in code?
why: IOrganizationService is the interface used to perform data operations against Dataverse from plug-in code - you call its Retrieve/RetrieveMultiple methods to read records (and Create/Update/Delete to write). IPlugin is the interface the plug-in class implements, ITracingService writes to the trace log, IServiceProvider gives access to the other services, and IPluginExecutionContext exposes the event context (InputParameters, images, etc.) - none of them retrieve records themselves.
